title.en: Establish and Maintain an Inventory of Accounts

prose.en: Establish and maintain an inventory of all accounts managed in the enterprise. The inventory must at a minimum include user, administrator, and service accounts. The inventory, at a minimum, should contain the person's name, username, start/stop dates, and department. Validate that all active accounts are authorized, on a recurring schedule at a minimum quarterly, or more frequently.
An inventory of all accounts managed in the enterprise is established and maintained.
The inventory includes, at a minimum, user, administrator accounts, and service accounts.
The inventory, at a minimum, contains the person's name, username, start/stop dates, and department.
All active accounts are validated and authorized, on a recurring schedule, at a minimum, quarterly, or more frequently.
